name: Patch Clamp
short_description: Electrophysiological recording technique for measuring ionic currents in cells.
detailed_description: Patch-clamp electrophysiology measures ionic currents and membrane potentials in single cells using a glass pipette sealed to the membrane. This project treats published patch-clamp data as the validation ground truth for its compartmental model, and this is the sole exception to the project's in-vivo-out-of-scope rule.
